title: Standard Single Room
description:
Our room features one large double bed and a bathroom with a shower cabin.

Ottoman-style sedate


Wooden Nightstand
LED TV
Air conditioning system
Central heating system
Telephone
Safe
Wardrobe
Wake-up system
Hair dryer
High-quality towel and slipper sets
Rich bouquet products
Personal toothbrush
Water service
